race.comment: FROZEN PRINCESS (9) battled away gamely into the placings on debut last month and then turned in a brave effort last time at Seymour when sent forward. Peaking now and can get off the mark despite the sticky draw. PIERRE LE QUILL (6) comes through two good maidens and should be hitting his straps now third-up but could end up a long way back from the draw. Watch for him launching late if the pace is decent. ASK YOUR MOTHER (1) boxed on steadily into fourth here when resuming two weeks ago. Fitter and is in the mix. SERENE DEFENSE (13) strips fitter fourth-up and strikes an easier assignment. In the mix too.
